title: NEEPMeat Official Modpack
description: A small modpack providing a working installation of NEEPMeat with some opinionated extras. Can be played on its own, or used as a base for a larger modpack.
body:
# NEEPMeat Official Modpack

This is a small modpack focusing on [NEEPMeat](https://modrinth.com/mod/neepmeat). Unlike other modpacks that include NEEPMeat, this one is created with the goal of *not breaking any NEEPMeat features*. It can be used if you just want a NEEPMeat installation without having to manually deal with the dependencies, or as a base to add more content mods to.

It provides:

- A working installation of NEEPMeat.
- Consistent theming of menus and screens.
- Some texture and data pack alterations.

## Extra Features

- Pre-1.17 ore textures.
- A more miserable-looking deepslate texture.
- A lovely custom title screen.
- Estrogen recipes using NEEPMeat machines.
- Optional Iris/Colorwheel for shader use.

Maybe at some point I'll make an full soundtrack for the pack.

## For Linux Users

If your game fails to start, and you get a message in the log saying `A fatal error has been detected by the Java Runtime Environment ...  Problematic frame:
 C  [libopenal.so+0x9fb4d] ...`, try explicitly speficying the location of your OpenAL library in your launcher's JVM options:

`-Dorg.lwjgl.openal.libname=<path to your openal.so>`

This is probably `-Dorg.lwjgl.openal.libname=/usr/lib/libopenal.so`

Alternatively, you could just disable Sound Filters in the mod list.

## Licensing

- Music: CC-BY-SA-NC
- Everything else (excluding mods): MIT

## QNA (Questions Nobody Asked)

_Why is it called 'NEEPMeat Official Modpack?_

- I couldn't think of a better name.
